name: wx-codex
description: Bridge Codex to WeChat DevTools for mini program preview workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Bridge Codex to WeChat DevTools for mini program previews.
interface.longDescription: A local MCP bridge that lets Codex detect WeChat DevTools, read mini program project config, open projects, and trigger preview builds.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use WX-Codex to work with local WeChat mini program projects. Detect WeChat DevTools first, read project.config.json, then open or preview the project when requested.
